headlines.title: Victim’s family in fatal Texas Tesla ‘automated driving assistance’ crash files lawsuit
headlines.description: Attorneys for Martha Avila’s family said the Tesla was in “Autopilot” mode when the speeding car crashed into the 76-year-old woman’s home, killing her.

headlines.title: An AI-generated Michael Caine is narrating Homer’s ‘Odyssey’ now
headlines.description: The voice generation company ElevenLabs released an audiobook version of the ancient Greek classic Tuesday.

headlines.title: Global tech sell-off intensifies, led by AI and chip stocks
headlines.description: Markets tumbled around the world as renewed doubts about sky-high valuations took hold of investors in some of the largest AI, chip and memory stocks.

headlines.title: How AI is helping fans follow the action and golfers navigate the rules at the U.S. Open
headlines.description: The U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills showcases how the USGA is using AI technology to transform golf.

headlines.title: Bill that would mandate AI chip location tracking gains industry support
headlines.description: Half a dozen companies came out in support of the Chips Security Act, which would require location-tracking mechanisms for America’s most advanced computing chips

headlines.title: AI helped diagnose 18 children whose rare diseases had stumped doctors
headlines.description: Researchers from Boston Children’s Hospital identified 18 diagnoses for children with rare diseases using OpenAI’s o3 model.

headlines.title: Trump cancels plan to sign housing bill until Congress passes election reforms
headlines.description: President Trump abruptly canceled the signing of a bipartisan housing bill until Congress is able to pass sweeping election reforms. NBC News' Jonathan Allen reports on the president's decision and the roadblocks the SAVE America Act faces in the Senate.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: Cristiano Ronaldo makes history and joins in World Cup scoring barrage
headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo silenced his critics (at least for one game) with a defiant performance against Uzbekistan, which is ranked 58th in the world by FIFA.

headlines.title: ¡Doblete de Cristiano Ronaldo! Portugal amplía la goleada ante Uzbekistán
headlines.description: Portugal salió con velocidad al contragolpe y Bruno Fernandes filtró un gran pase para Cristiano Ronaldo. El capitán portugués definió al primer toque para firmar su doblete y alcanzar los 10 goles en la historia de los Mundiales.

headlines.title: Physicist reacts to Trump executive order calling for a quantum computer
headlines.description: NBC News' Gadi Schwartz talks to California Institute of Technology Professor John Preskill about President Trump's executive order calling for a quantum computer. Preskill talks about what he hopes comes out of the order and what to look out for.

headlines.title: AI-generated Michael Caine voice to narrate new edition of the 'Odyssey'
headlines.description: An AI-generated replica of actor Michael Caine's voice will narrate a new edition of the "Odyssey," produced by the company ElevenLabs. The London-based company, which launched in 2023, has ramped up its efforts to woo talent as it seeks to win over creatives wary of AI.

headlines.title: Inside the high-tech race to stop wildfires before they spiral out of control
headlines.description: As wildfire seasons become "fire years," new technology is helping crews detect blazes faster, predict their spread and respond rapidly. NBC News’ Steve Patterson took to the skies with the aerial firefighters battling America's growing wildfire threat.
